Human MYH9 , RAD52 , and 53BP1 were cloned into the pEZ-Lv151, pEZ-Lv197-mCherry, and pEZ-Lv197-EYFP vectors (GeneCopoeia, USA), respectively.
A total of 1 µg of RNA was reverse-transcribed into cDNA using the SureScript™ First-Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit (GeneCopoeia, Rockville, MD, USA).

product_name: HLX-knockdown lentivirus particles|negative control lentivirus particles
sentence: Lentivirus packaging and stable cell line establishment HLX-knockdown lentivirus particles (PP-HSH100211-LVRU6GP) and negative control lentivirus particles (LP146-025) were purchased from GeneCopoeia (Rockville, MD).

product_name: reporter gene vectors containing the 3’UTRs of CYP2C8 and UGT1A3
sentence: All the required reporter gene vectors containing the 3’UTRs of CYP2C8 and UGT1A3 , and the empty vector plasmid construct were purchased from GeneCopoeia (Rockville, Maryland, United States).
